content: Archie: This damn city, always so harsh... Just like I like it, but not when MJR is in danger. The Syndicate, the damn Gentry, everyone's after him. And those fucking Raiders... I just wish we could get out of this shit-hole and find some peace. But then, who would protect MJR if it wasn't me? I'd rather die than let those cunt Raiders get their hands on him.
Archie: Yeah, just another day in this fucked-up city. But as long as MJR's got me by his side, those pricks better watch their backs.
